token.description: Insightly API token, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username with a blank password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Insightly API base URL, pod-specific (e.g. https://api.<pod>.insightly.com/v3.1). Defaults to the na1 pod, matching legacy's default; override with your account's actual pod URL.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
